calendarFaqs.q: Does Cumberland County Schools have a fall break in 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. Cumberland County Schools has a fall break running from Oct 13, 2025 to Oct 17, 2025, a total of 5 days.

calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Cumberland County Schools in 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school for Cumberland County Schools is Monday, August 11, 2025. Students and staff are expected to report on this date to begin the new academic year.

yearNumbers.label: Fall Break
yearNumbers.detail: Cumberland County includes a 5-day fall break in mid-October — uncommon among North Carolina traditional-calendar districts.

yearNumbers.label: Good Friday
yearNumbers.detail: Good Friday is observed as a school holiday, two weeks after Spring Break ends (Mar 20).

calendarNotes:
Cumberland County Schools opens the 2025–2026 school year on Monday, August 11, 2025 — one of the earliest start dates among North Carolina traditional-calendar districts. The early August start isn't arbitrary: North Carolina's 1,025-hour instructional requirement rewards earlier starts by allowing End-of-Grade (EOG) and End-of-Course (EOC) assessments to complete before Memorial Day weekend. Starting in early August also gives CCS critical buffer days for hurricane-related school closures — Fayetteville's location in eastern North Carolina puts it in the path of Atlantic storms that can force multi-day shutdowns. A third factor unique to Cumberland County: closing the school year by late May keeps families on-track before the June peak of Fort Liberty's PCS transfer season, when large numbers of military families begin summer moves.

A structurally notable feature of this calendar is the 5-day Fall Break running October 13–17. Most North Carolina traditional-calendar districts do not have a fall break of this length — at most a day or two in October. The Fall Break serves as a mid-semester reset roughly halfway between the August start and Winter Break (December 22 – January 2), and is one of the CCS calendar elements that most distinguishes it from peer NC districts like Wake County and Charlotte-Mecklenburg.

Good Friday (April 3, 2026) is observed as a school holiday. Easter falls on April 5, 2026, placing Good Friday two weeks after Spring Break ends on March 20 — an unusually wide gap that reflects the late Easter date that year.

CCS also maintains Board-approved Year-Round and Cross Creek & Cumberland International calendars for families enrolled in those programs, each with a different break structure than the traditional calendar shown here.
